title: Leki ji Pairha
gloss: Multiplication tables with Sindhi alphabet exercises for the use of boys.
notes: Section headed '(Designed for Educational purposes.)'. Date given only as June 1910.

author: Ghani Ullah, Maulvi
title: Ruqqa-át-i-Abdul Ghani
notes: Persian epistolary manual sold by Sikh book-seller in Peshawar.

author: Murad Shah, Hazrat
title: Murad-ul-Ashiqin
gloss: Devotional verses with a short history of the author and his family.
publisher: Malak Fazl-ud-din, Chanan Din and Taj-ud-din, Book-sellers

flags.issue: left-margin serial digit faint; read as 5 (followed by 6, 7)

title: Nám-i-Haq
gloss: A well-known book of Muhammadan precepts relating to ablutions, bathing, daily prayers and fasting.
publisher: Haji Charagh-ud din-Siraj ud din, Book-sellers

title: Zaruri Kalan Zaruri Khurd Wird-ul-Muridin
gloss: A book of Muhammadan precepts about daily prayers, etc.

title: Anis-ul-Waizin, Afghani
gloss: A book of sermons for the use of Muhammadan preachers.
notes: Date given only as May 1910. Pushto sermons published by Sikh book-selling firm in Lahore.

flags.issue: left-margin serial digit faint; read as 2
last digit unclear (921/924); read as 924 because 921 is clearly printed at Urdu—Medicine s17 (p31) and regs are unique within the year

author: Abdullah-ul-Imadi, Maulvi
title: Falsafa-i-Ibn-i-Arabi
gloss: A brief account of the life and works of Muhammad Ibn-i-Arabi, a reputed Muhammadan theologian and philosopher who was born in 560 Hijri.
notes: URDU—BIOGRAPHY serials continue from Q2. Date given only as June 1910. Philosophy of Ibn Arabi popularized by the Vakil (Amritsar newspaper) trading company.
